fixture: 020_combined_selects

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE mixed (id INTEGER NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO mixed VALUES (1, 8)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO mixed VALUES (2, 13)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT id, amount FROM mixed
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] amount INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 1 | 8
      [1] 2 | 13

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT amount - id AS delta FROM mixed
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] delta INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 7
      [1] 11
